title: polypodium pilosum
intro: Polypodium pilosum, also known as the common polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium pilosum include its ability to treat various health issues such as wounds, ulcers, and gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Polypodium pilosum is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
